user_attributes.title: User Attributes
user_attributes.description: Arbitrary key-value attributes from the Authentik user or group policy.

is_superuser.title: Is Superuser
is_superuser.description: Whether the authenticated user has superuser/admin privileges in Authentik.

AKProxy.title: AKProxy
AKProxy.description: Authentik-specific proxy metadata injected into tokens by the ak_proxy scope.

AKProxyUserAttributes.title: AKProxyUserAttributes
AKProxyUserAttributes.description: Authentik proxy user attributes, typically set via user/group attribute policies.

iss.title: Issuer
iss.description: Identifies the principal that issued the JWT. Typically the Authentik application URL.

sub.title: Subject
sub.description: Unique identifier for the authenticated user or service account within the issuer.

aud.title: Audience
aud.description: Intended recipient(s) of the token. Must match one of the configured client IDs.

exp.title: Expiration Time
exp.description: Unix timestamp after which the token must not be accepted.

iat.title: Issued At
iat.description: Unix timestamp at which the token was issued.

auth_time.title: Authentication Time
auth_time.description: Unix timestamp when the end-user authentication occurred.

acr.title: Authentication Context Class Reference
acr.description: Identifies the authentication context class. Authentik uses 'goauthentik.io/providers/oauth2/default' by default.

name.title: Full Name
name.description: Full name of the authenticated user.

given_name.title: Given Name
given_name.description: Given (first) name of the authenticated user.

preferred_username.title: Preferred Username
preferred_username.description: Shorthand name the user prefers to be referred to, typically the Authentik username.

nickname.title: Nickname
nickname.description: Casual name of the user, may differ from preferred_username.

email.title: Email Address
email.description: Primary email address of the authenticated user.

email_verified.title: Email Verified
email_verified.description: Whether the user's email address has been verified. Authentik sets this to false by default.

entitlements.title: Entitlements
entitlements.description: Application-level permissions granted to this token, populated via Authentik scope mappings. Follows RFC 9068 / SCIM schema conventions (e.g. 'read:me', 'write:token_issuer').

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Roles assigned to the user, as emitted by Authentik role/scope mappings.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Authentik groups the user belongs to. Informational — authorisation should use entitlements or roles.

ak_proxy.title: Authentik Proxy Metadata
ak_proxy.description: Authentik-specific metadata injected when using the ak_proxy scope, including user attributes and superuser status.

ValidatedOIDCClaims.title: ValidatedOIDCClaims
ValidatedOIDCClaims.description:
Validated claims from an OIDC JWT issued by Authentik.

Covers standard OIDC claims (RFC 7519 / OIDC Core 1.0) as well as
Authentik-specific extensions such as `ak_proxy`, `entitlements`, and `roles`.
